chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No.374 of 2025 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz ul Hassan Shah Applicant:- Mst. Allah Wasaee through M/s. Aurangzeb and Amir Hussain Mangi, advocates. Respondent:- The State through Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, Deputy Prosecutor General. Date of hearing:- 18.12.2025 O R D E R =============== MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant is a widow of Allah Wadhayo @ Wadho absconder in Crime No.08/2020, offence under sections 324, 353, 399, 402 PPC of P.S. Setharja. 2. This Court in Special Cr. A.T.A. No.133/2020, passed a general order directing the relevant authorities to freeze the account of all absconders in the province of Sindh and block their CNICs. In compliance, the CNIC of husband of applicant was blocked and his bank account was freezed. Her husband however died on 07.12.2021, such information was submitted in the trial Court viz. Assistant Sessions Judge, Mirwah, upon which, a verification report was sought from relevant Police Station. In the report, the death of husband of the applicant was confirmed, hence the trial Court vide order dated 17.01.2022 (available at page-45 of the file) abated the proceedings against husband of the applicant. 3. Grievance of the applicant is that although her husband has expired and proceedings have abated, yet his bank account has not been unfreezed, hence she is unable to withdrawn pension which is being deposited in his account. 4. Learned DPG submits that any order may be passed, but has confirmed that proceedings against the husband of the applicant have been already abated. 5. We in view of the given facts and circumstances order that the bank account of husband of the applicant shall be unfreezed and if his CNIC is still blocked, shall be unblocked enabling the applicant to have her right to withdraw the pension.

Learned DPG submits that any order may be passed, but has confirmed that proceedings against the husband of the applicant have been already abated. 5. We in view of the given facts and circumstances order that the bank account of husband of the applicant shall be unfreezed and if his CNIC is still blocked, shall be unblocked enabling the applicant to have her right to withdraw the pension. The Cr. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE HANIF
